tasks.title: GAP-015: Create TransactionRollbackError class in error.ts
tasks.description: Create TransactionRollbackError sentinel class in packages/db/src/utils/error.ts. MUST extend Error (NOT DbError — it is intentional rollback, not a DB error). MUST include Object.setPrototypeOf(this, TransactionRollbackError.prototype) for correct instanceof behavior. Export from packages/db/src/index.ts. This class is required by T-016 (GAP-002 fix).

DrizzleClient is the wider union type — this change is safe (NodePgDatabase is a subtype).

Change initializeDb() return type (line ~86)

tasks.title: GAP-002: Fix withTransaction error handling — stop swallowing TransactionRollbackError
tasks.description: Fix packages/db/src/client.ts withTransaction (lines 114-128). Currently wraps ALL errors in DbError causing double-wrapping. Fix: if error instanceof TransactionRollbackError, re-throw as-is. If error instanceof DbError, re-throw as-is. Only wrap unknown errors in DbError. REQUIRES T-007 (TransactionRollbackError class) to be done first.

subtasks.title: Read withTransaction implementation in client.ts
Add instanceof check for TransactionRollbackError — re-throw
Add instanceof check for DbError — re-throw
Only wrap unknown errors in new DbError
Write unit tests for error passthrough behavior

tasks.title: GAP-014: Add existingTx param to withTransaction for nested tx support
tasks.description: Add optional existingTx?: DrizzleClient param to withTransaction in packages/db/src/client.ts. If existingTx is provided, use it directly (skip creating new transaction). If undefined, create new transaction as before. This enables SPEC-059 Phase 4 (cross-entity tx wrapping) and is required by Phase 3 (BaseCrudService) and Phase 5 (billing).

subtasks.title: Add existingTx?: DrizzleClient param to withTransaction signature
If existingTx provided, execute callback with existingTx directly
If existingTx undefined, create new db.transaction() as before
Write unit tests for nested tx behavior
